query: Tell me everything about the companies behind my open support cases.
reasoning: The query requires a comprehensive view of the companies related to the user's open support cases, necessitating information from all available agents.

steps.task: Find all open support cases and their associated companies. Return the company names and related details.
Search for emails, calendar events, and OneDrive files mentioning the companies identified in step 1. Include communication history and any relevant calendar events.
Search for locations matching the companies identified in step 1 by name. Also retrieve any orders or catalog items if relevant.

synthesis: Combine the company information from step 1 with the communication history from step 2 and the location data from step 3 to provide a comprehensive overview of the companies behind the open support cases.
